title: Market participation is not wealth creation: 5 mistakes retail investors should avoid
summary: Experts underscore that there is a world of difference between rebalancing your portfolio and churning it. The former is good, the latter not.

title: Investing discipline beats market predictions: Why experts want investors to ignore the noise
summary: Investing should be calm and research-based, not influenced by social media hype. Experts urge investors to validate sources, consider risks, and focus on data. Maintaining discipline and sticking to personal goals is crucial for long-term success in wealth creation.

title: Can a ₹15 lakh FD generate ₹1 lakh annual income? Here's the simple calculation
summary: A ₹15 lakh fixed deposit can deliver a steady annual income with the right interest rate. See how a ₹15 lakh FD can generate around ₹1 lakh yearly, compare current bank FD rates, and understand the impact of taxes before investing.

title: 8th pay commission to visit Mumbai railway depts for firsthand experience of working conditions — What's on the agenda?
summary: 8th pay commission: The panel will visit various railway departments in Mumbai to gain firsthand experience of employees' working conditions. On the agenda is observation of daily operations, duties and job risks. &nbsp;

title: Which equity mutual funds topped SIP returns? These AMCs dominated the rankings
summary: Small-cap and mid-cap funds dominated the SIP return charts over three, five and 10 years. The rankings also reveal a handful of AMCs that consistently produced some of the best-performing equity mutual funds.

title: DA hike, bonus, minimum wage increase — Here's what Himachal Pradesh State Forest Development Corporation staff will get
summary: DA hike: Himachal Pradesh State Forest Development Corporation (HPSFDC) employees are set to receive a 3% hike in dearness allowance, minimum wage hike, and bonus for staff who draw up to ₹21,000 monthly salary.&nbsp;

title: Debt mutual funds: Only 4 schemes delivered over 10% SIP returns in 10 years
summary: Very few debt funds have delivered double-digit SIP returns over the past decade. See which schemes topped the charts over three, five and 10 years.

title: 7 personal finance rules everyone should know before turning 30 to build lasting wealth
summary: Strong money habits build lasting wealth. These personal finance rules can help young Indians save smarter, invest early, avoid costly debt, and plan for retirement with confidence. Small financial decisions today create greater security and long-term financial success.

title: 8th Pay Commission: ₹18,000 to ₹69,000? Here's the math behind the demand
summary: Employee unions have proposed raising the minimum basic pay to ₹69,000 from ₹18,000. Here's a breakdown of the key calculations behind the demand.

title: F&O Talk: Smallcap index better placed than Nifty, says Sudeep Shah; picks 9 stocks for next week
summary: SBI Securities expects Nifty's breakout to strengthen if it crosses 24,450, opening the door to 24,900. While small-caps continue outperforming, Bank Nifty retains a positive bias. The brokerage also highlights Aurobindo Pharma, DLF, Titan and Oberoi Realty among top picks.

title: How Did Trump Make $1.4 Billion From Crypto?
Raamdeo Agrawal's 7 book recommendations for stock market investors
summary: Motilal Oswal Chairman Raamdeo Agrawal says purposeful reading shapes better investors and recommends seven timeless investing books, including works by Peter Lynch, Warren Buffett, Philip Fisher and Howard Marks, urging readers to internalise key lessons instead of chasing dozens of titles.

title: Retail investors bet on these 10 small-cap stocks; they rally up to 185% in 3 months
summary: Retail investors raised stakes in 195 Nifty Smallcap 500 stocks during the March 2026 quarter, with over 100 delivering 25-185% returns since April. Four stocks turned multibaggers, while Cemindia Projects, Apollo Micro Systems and Lloyds Engineering led the rally.

title: Bitcoin trades near $62,000; inflation, geopolitical risks remain key market drivers
summary: Bitcoin rebounded near $62,000 after recovering from last week's lows, supported by optimism over Federal Reserve policy. Ethereum and major altcoins also gained, though investors remain cautious amid inflation, geopolitical tensions, energy prices and mixed ETF investment flows.

title: Gold’s sharp correction: What lies ahead for prices?
summary: Gold has corrected sharply from record highs as a stronger US dollar, elevated bond yields and expectations of prolonged higher interest rates weighed on prices. Experts view the decline as a technical correction, recommending staggered buying and long-term holding amid supportive structural demand.

title: IPO Calendar: Mainboard IPO of Kusumgar among 3 new public offers on investors' radar next week
summary: Kusumgar's ₹650 crore IPO will open on July 8 with a 33% grey market premium. The engineered fabrics maker, serving defence and aerospace sectors, is launching a pure offer for sale, while two SME IPOs are also scheduled next week.

title: Top picks! Redington among 5 stocks with upside potential of up to 27%. Do you own any?
summary: Monarch Networth Capital has maintained Buy ratings on Pricol, Redington, Sundram Fasteners, Travel Food Services and Viyash Scientific, citing strong earnings growth, improving margins and business expansion. The brokerage sees upside potential of up to 27% across these stocks.

title: Why the capital cycle approach is a powerful framework for long-term investing
summary: Edward Chancellor advocates the capital cycle approach, urging investors to focus on industry supply, capital allocation and management quality instead of demand forecasts. title: Why the next Bitcoin cycle will be won by investors who understand liquidity
summary: Bitcoin's next rally is likely to be driven by liquidity, ETF inflows and monetary conditions rather than retail hype, according to Mudrex's Prateek Gupta. Institutional investors, Fed policy, global money supply and on-chain activity are emerging as the key indicators shaping future price movements
